tasks.label: flutter: clean, get, run (Linux)
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get && flutter run -d linux

tasks.label: flutter: run (Linux)
tasks.command: flutter run -d linux

tasks.label: flutter: clean
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock

tasks.label: flutter: pub get
tasks.command: flutter pub get

tasks.label: flutter: build web
tasks.command: flutter build web --release

tasks.label: serve: copy config
tasks.command: cp serve.json build/web/

tasks.label: serve: start
tasks.command: npx serve -s build/web -p 3000 --cors

tasks.label: flutter: run (Chrome)
tasks.command: flutter run -d chrome

tasks.label: flutter: run (Web Server)
tasks.command: flutter run -d web-server --web-port 3000 --web-hostname 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: pwa: rebuild
tasks.command: flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/

tasks.label: pwa: clean build
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/

tasks.label: pwa: clean build + serve
tasks.command: flutter clean && rm -rf build/ && rm -f pubspec.lock && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/ && npx serve -s build/web -p 3000 --cors

tasks.label: pwa: watch and build
tasks.command: while true; do inotifywait -r -e modify,create,delete lib/ 2>/dev/null; echo '🔄 Rebuilding...'; flutter build web --release && cp serve.json build/web/ && echo '✅ Done!'; done

tasks.label: flutter: doctor
tasks.command: flutter doctor -v

tasks.label: flutter: devices
tasks.command: flutter devices

tasks.label: git: show latest tag
tasks.command: git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tags found'

tasks.label: git: increment patch tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v.0.0.0"); new=$(echo $latest | awk -F. "{print \$1\".\"\$2\".\"\$3+1}"); echo "📌 Latest tag: $latest"; echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"; read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: increment minor tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v.0.0.0"); IFS="." read -r major minor patch <<< $(echo $latest | sed "s/v\.//"); new_minor=$((minor + 1)); new="v.$major.$new_minor.0"; echo "📌 Latest tag: $latest"; echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"; read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: increment major tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v.0.0.0"); IFS="." read -r major minor patch <<< $(echo $latest | sed "s/v\.//"); new_major=$((major + 1)); new="v.$new_major.0.0"; echo "📌 Latest tag: $latest"; echo "🏷️  New tag: $new"; read -p "Create and push tag $new? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Tag $new created and pushed!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: create custom tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'read -p "Enter tag name (e.g., v.1.0.0): " tag; echo "Creating tag: $tag"; read -p "Push to origin? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag $tag && git push origin $tag && echo "✅ Tag $tag created and pushed!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: list all tags
tasks.command: git tag -l --sort=-v:refname

tasks.label: git: delete last tag
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$latest" ]; then echo "No tags found"; exit 1; fi; echo "Last tag: $latest"; read -p "Delete tag $latest locally and remotely? (y/n): " -n 1 -r; echo; if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then git tag -d $latest && git push origin --delete $latest && echo "✅ Tag $latest deleted!"; else echo "❌ Cancelled"; fi'

tasks.label: git: release (patch + push + build)
tasks.command: bash -c 'latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v.0.0.0"); new=$(echo $latest | awk -F. "{print \$1\".\"\$2\".\"\$3+1}"); echo "📌 Creating release: $new"; git tag $new && git push origin $new && echo "✅ Release $new created!"'
